name: H2O PCA
description: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is used for dimensionality reduction and identifying the primary patterns in high-dimensional data by transforming features into a set of uncorrelated components.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input

fields.name: transform
fields.title: Transform
fields.description: Transformation to apply to the data before PCA. 'STANDARDIZE' is highly recommended to ensure all features are on the same scale.

fields.name: pcaMethod
fields.title: PCA Method
fields.description: Algorithm used to compute principal components. 'GramSVD' is standard; 'GLRM' is better for categorical data.

fields.name: pcaImpl
fields.title: PCA Implementation
fields.description: Mathematical implementation for Eigenvalue or Singular Value Decomposition.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Fraction of data used for the PCA calculation (e.g., 1.0 for the whole dataset).

fields.name: k
fields.title: K
fields.description: Number of principal components to compute (must be less than or equal to the number of features).

fields.name: maxIterations
fields.title: Max Iterations
fields.description: Maximum number of training iterations for algorithms that use iterative methods.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed for reproducibility. Use -1 for a random seed.

fields.name: useAllFactorLevels
fields.title: Use All Factor Levels
fields.description: If true, includes the first factor level in categorical expansion. Recommended for GLRM method.

fields.name: computeMetrics
fields.title: Compute Metrics
fields.description: Whether to compute metrics (like variance explained) on the training data.

fields.name: imputeMissing
fields.title: Impute Missing
fields.description: Whether to automatically fill missing values with the column mean before running PCA.

fields.name: ignoreConstCols
fields.title: Ignore Const Columns
fields.description: Whether to discard columns with only one unique value.

fields.name: scoreEachIteration
fields.title: Score Each Iteration
fields.description: Enable to track convergence progress during each iteration.

fields.name: maxRuntimeSecs
fields.title: Max Runtime Secs
fields.description: Maximum time allowed for model training in seconds. 0 means no limit.

fields.name: ignoredCols
fields.title: Ignored Columns
fields.description: Columns to exclude from the transformation process.

fields.name: columnsToCategorical
fields.title: Columns to Categorical
fields.description: Numeric columns that should be treated as categorical factors/enums.
